name: Port Scan Detection (NDR)
description: Identifies port scanning activity via network traffic analysis - high confidence NDR detection
query:
// Port Scan Detection (NDR)
// Multiple connection attempts to different ports detected at sensor level
events from ndr_flow
where alert_type = "port_scan"
  or connection_state = "failed"
group by source_ip
having count(distinct destination_port) > 50
within 60 seconds
